caption: A man wearing a light blue button-down shirt and a black headset with a microphone stands against a plain, pale blue wall. The text "Ashish Raichur" appears in the bottom-left corner of each frame. Initially, the man looks downward with a neutral expression. As the sequence progresses, he raises his head and opens his mouth, appearing to speak. By the final sequence, his head is tilted slightly upward, and his mouth is partially open as he continues to speak. The lighting remains consistent, and the camera angle stays fixed in a medium shot, focusing on his head and shoulders. There are no other people or objects visible in the scene besides the man and his headset.
